capabilities.name: Global block CRUD
capabilities.notes: Skill not in global-blocks-module skillSeeds — seeded via supabase/seed/module-skills.json / archived migration, so the in-module skill surface is absent per the dual-surface check.

capabilities.name: Reuse across pages
capabilities.verify: useGlobalBlocks.ts; PublicNavigation.tsx + PublicFooter.tsx render global blocks on every public page
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing in module skillSeeds (see block_crud).

capabilities.name: Edit once, update everywhere
capabilities.verify: single global_blocks row per slot; edits in GlobalBlocksPage.tsx propagate to all pages via useGlobalBlocks
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing in module skillSeeds (see block_crud).

capabilities.name: Block categories
capabilities.verify: global_blocks only has fixed slots (header/footer) + type; no category field, skill, or UI
